contactId.title: contactId
contactId.description: The Salesforce Contact ID for the customer. Pass the value from Get Delivery Details output.

assetId.title: assetId
assetId.description: The Salesforce Asset ID for the VDD device. Pass the value from Get Delivery Details output.

customerName.title: customerName
customerName.description: The customer's first name for personalization. Pass the value from Get Delivery Details output.

serialNumber.title: serialNumber
serialNumber.description: The device serial number. Pass the value from Get Delivery Details output.

preferredDate1.title: preferredDate1
preferredDate1.description: The customer's first preferred installation date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Extract this from the customer's message.

preferredTime1.title: preferredTime1
preferredTime1.description: Time of day for the first preference. Must be exactly one of: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening. Extract from customer's message — map AM to Morning, PM to Afternoon.

preferredDate2.title: preferredDate2
preferredDate2.description: The customer's second preferred installation date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Extract this from the customer's message.

preferredTime2.title: preferredTime2
preferredTime2.description: Time of day for the second preference. Must be exactly one of: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening.

preferredDate3.title: preferredDate3
preferredDate3.description: The customer's third preferred installation date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Extract this from the customer's message.

preferredTime3.title: preferredTime3
preferredTime3.description: Time of day for the third preference. Must be exactly one of: Morning, Afternoon, or Evening.
